signals.headline: Powell Confirms He Will Remain Fed Chair Until Successor Confirmed Amid Ongoing Investigation | NO new confirmation of s
signals.raw:
Powell Confirms He Will Remain Fed Chair Until Successor Confirmed Amid Ongoing Investigation | NO new confirmation of successor | HIGH confidence**[1][2]

Jerome Powell stated he will stay in his role until a successor is confirmed by the Senate and a criminal investigation into the Fed (related to expenses like headquarters renovation) is resolved; his term ends in May 2026**[1][2][3].
